## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO optimizations and align on the December backlink strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Landing Page Fixes:** SEO recommendations must be moved from the outdated AI Role Play V1 to the current V2. The Coaching Platform page will be made use-case agnostic (not just sales) to support future product growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**New URL Taxonomy:** A new URL structure was approved to create clear content clusters (e.g., `/ai-roleplays/sales/`) for better SEO and analytics reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**December Backlink Strategy:** The strategy shifts from general homepage authority to specific product pages. Priority is the AI Role Play pillar page and the new Sales Roleplay page, which Garett will sprint to launch by mid-December.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [**Content Performance:** The new AI Role Play comparison content is performing well with 45 organic sessions in its first month, despite targeting zero-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

## Topics

### Landing Page Feedback & Corrections

  - [**AI Role Play Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [**Issue:** SEO recommendations were applied to the outdated V1 page.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [**Action:** Move all recommendations to the current V2 page.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [**Goal:** Experiment with an aggressive page title (`Best AI Sales Roleplay Platform`) to test ranking for the high-volume keyword "Sales Training Platform."](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Coaching Platform Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Issue:** The page was optimized specifically for "sales coaching."](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This targeted a high-volume keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Action:** Make the main page use-case agnostic to support future products (e.g., call scoring). A separate, dedicated "Sales Coaching Software" page will be created.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

### New URL Taxonomy & Structure

  - [**Approved Structure:** A new URL hierarchy will create clear content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
      - [**Example:** `/ai-roleplays/sales/`](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Improves SEO by signaling topic authority to Google and simplifies analytics reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**Industry Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [**Decision:** Keep industry pages under the `/industries/` pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This structure is more flexible, allowing pages to cover multiple products (e.g., AI roleplays, call scoring) as the product suite evolves.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

### Content & Backlink Strategy

  - [**Content Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
      - [**Status:** 40 AI roleplay comparison posts published in November, ahead of schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
      - [**Risk:** Production may slow this week due to team illness and OOO.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Performance (Nov 4–25):**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Traffic:** 58 total sessions (45 organic) for the new content.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Context:** This is a strong result for pages targeting zero-volume keywords, which typically take 3+ months to gain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [**Reporting:** Garett requested GA4 conversion events (signups, demos) be added to the performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [**Backlink Strategy Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
      - [**Past Strategy:** Build general domain authority by linking to the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
      - [**New Strategy:** Focus link equity on specific product pages to drive direct business value.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
      - [**December Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
          - [**Priority 1:** AI Role Play pillar page.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
          - [**Priority 2:** New Sales Roleplay page (Garett to launch by mid-Dec).](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
          - [**Future:** L\&D and Customer Support pages will receive links in January.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
      - [Move SEO recommendations from AI Role Play V1 to V2.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [Propose a final URL structure for the "Sales Roleplay Software" page.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [Add GA4 conversion events to the performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [Provide target pages and anchor text examples for the December backlink campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [**Garett:**](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [Sprint with Sean to launch the new Sales Roleplay page by mid-December.](https://fathom.video/share/ydUvuzhAapE_Pfa1LFLotYBhkVcSV9Y-?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
